text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day before the tryouts, I go to meet up with Mejiro Bright and
Mejiro Dober before heading to the Mejiro meet and greet.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Ugh.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's past our meeting time, but Mejiro Bright is nowhere to be seen.
After thirty minutes of awkward silence together with Mejiro Dober...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: My, are you two alone together? Just like peas in a pod.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
No, we're not! And Bright, you're late... Wait, isn't that doll... Maki?
Why did you bring her here?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I brought Maki with me. I thought this a good opportunity to let
her witness Ryan's majestic aura.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Fine. Dressing her up must've delayed you, right? Everyone else has already gone ahead to the venue, so let's catch the next train.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Okay... Achoo. Mm... It feels as if it could snow at any moment.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just like Mejiro Bright predicted, snow begins falling on our way
there. It's as if we've gone back to the middle of winter, with mounds
of snow everywhere you look.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh?! McQueen and Ryan haven't arrived yet?

text_block_list.name: Event Staff
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, traffic jams caused by the sudden snowfall have
rendered their vehicle inoperable. Running would be dangerous, so
they're currently looking to catch the next train over.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
But they won't make it in time, will they? There's only five minutes
until the event is supposed to start, and the venue is already filled
with fans...

text_block_list.name: Event Staff
text_block_list.text:
We'll explain the situation to the fans and have them wait a little
longer. I'm sure they will understand, though they may become a little
restless.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I understand the situation. In that case... how about we talk to the fans instead? ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Hm? Wait, what?! You want the two of us to stall until they arrive?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Though we lack experience, we still bear the Mejiro name.
Rather than making the fans wait, we can entertain them and make
this event a success.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Well, I can see where you're coming from... but I don't know. I mean...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Fan A
text_block_list.text:
I wonder what they'll talk about today. It's not every day that you see
so many Mejiros in one place!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Right? In just a few more minutes, we'll get to see their majestic and
beautiful faces in the flesh... Oh wow, I'll make sure to burn this sight
into my eyes forever!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...I can't do it! Talking in front of that many people... it's too much for
me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
...Dober, I know I'm asking a lot from you. However, I am certain that
by myself, I won't be able to talk to the fans very well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
That is why I need your assistance. We'll just be talking—like we are
now... okay?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Talking isn't the problem... We have to do it in front of all these fans,
right? ...Sorry. I don't have the confidence...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
It'll be fine, don't worry. I shall be with you every step of the way.
You can trust me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though Mejiro Bright is doing her best to encourage Mejiro Dober, I
can't help but notice that her hand is trembling as well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
If it were McQueen, Ryan, or any other Mejiro, I'm sure they would
boldly step forward and resolve the situation. This time, it's our turn...
choice_data_list: (She's actually just as nervous as Dober. But...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I've decided—I will become the light of the Mejiro family!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She made up her mind to live up to the Mejiro name—pursuing
perfection in any and all situations. As for me...
choice_data_list: (I want to help make that dream come true.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
With that said, I do not wish to force your hand. It's okay. I shall take
the stage alone—
choice_data_list: Wait a second. I just came up with an idea...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Greetings, it's nice to meet everyone! ♪ My name is Mejiro Bright.
And joining me today is...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: ...Maki?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: "...Hello, I'm Maki. Nice to meet you..."

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Those two haven't made their debuts yet, have they? Is this
supposed to be the opening act?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Also... she called her Maki, but isn't that Dober? Are they doing a
puppet show? You don't see that too often.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You want me to talk as the doll?! Are you sure you're not just trying to
make things harder for me?!
choice_data_list: It'll help you take your mind off the audience.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The idea I came up with was to have Mejiro Dober talk to the fans
while holding Mejiro Bright's doll.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the doll as a third emcee, fewer people would look at Mejiro
Dober. On top of that, by talking as the doll, she could avoid looking
the audience in the eye.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
B-but... I just don't think I can do it. I can't stop thinking about how I
might tarnish the Mejiro name...
choice_data_list: It'll be okay—you've got Bright with you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright loves her family more than anything else. With her here,
the Mejiro family's reputation is sure to be safe. But more
importantly...
choice_data_list:
You know you're both Mejiro Umamusume,
right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Provisional Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
...It's as Provisional Trainer says. I'll cover you, so don't worry. I'll
make sure you don't burst into tears on stage.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Who said I'd burst into tears?! ...Fine, I get it. I want to help out too...
so I'll give it my best shot!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
And that's when Ryan took me by the hand to run together with her.
She was so cool in that moment.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Mm... Ryan's cool, all right. She's always been looking out for us. And
she doesn't let it go to her head.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. Every Mejiro has been spectacular even from a young age.
We're aiming to become like that too someday. Right, Berry?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Yeah—"I mean, what're you saying?! I'm Maki! How many times do I
gotta tell you?!"

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, they're so adorable. ♪
I get it, this is a bit they're doing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Both Dober and Bright have done well. We are in their debt.
However... why the doll?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Sorry to keep you waiting! We'll take it from here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
McQueen and Ryan take the stage and the crowd goes wild. It looks
like Bright and Dober have saved the day.
